violations.text: The following were observed in poor repair: 1) Prep area shelving (exposed dry wall) 2) Prep area (missing tiles) New Violation. Correct By: 03/17/2026

Various foods were observed held at 44-49 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. See disposal. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/03/2026

Salami which was prepared on site, date marked 2/20 was observed held beyond the 7 days. Food items exceeding the 7 days shall be discarded. See disposal. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/03/2026

Prep Unit #2 was not in good repair, ambient observed at 47F. PIC took unit out of service at time of inspection. Establishment to not store TCS foods in unit until serviced and reaches an ambient temperature of 41F or below. Proof of service to be sent to inspector prior to storing TCS foods. New Violation. Correct By: 03/03/2026

The following were in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. 1. prep area shelving (exposed drywall) 2. prep area (missing wall tiles) New Violation. Correct By: 03/17/2026

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the refuse area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 03/17/2026

Food was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/27/2025

The ice machine is lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. New Violation. Correct By: 02/27/2025
The grout in the prep unit area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/27/2025

The presence of fruit flies is not controlled as evidenced by fruit flies in the ware-washing area. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Per person in charge, pest control services have been scheduled. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/30/2023

Single-service articles were observed stored on the floor in the dry storage area. Single-service articles must be stored at least 6 inches off the ground. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/30/2023

The dishwasher located in the ware-washing area is not good repair. Per person in charge, a service call was placed and establishment is currently using the 3-bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 12/15/2023

The floors and walls throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/30/2023

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of biofilm. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice was voluntarily disposed of (see attached disposal form). Ice machine was taken out of service and must not be used until it is cleaned. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/30/2023

The food-contact surfaces of equipment and utensils were not sanitized. The required utensil surface temperature of 160 degrees Fahrenheit was not achieved during the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher as evidenced by the failure of the thermolabel (temperature indicator) affixed to the surface of a utensil to turn black. Dishwasher was taken out of service and must not be used until it is repaired. Establishment is to use the 3-bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 11/30/2023

Food was observed held at 43-47 degrees Fahrenheit in the pizza prep unit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Food was voluntarily disposed of (see attached disposal form). The ambient air temperature was observed at 46 degrees Fahrenheit during time of inspection. Pizza prep unit was taken out of service during time of inspection and must not be used until it can maintain an internal food temperature of 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below. Pizza prep unit must be repaired/adjusted/replaced. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/30/2023

Quaternary ammonium sanitizer solution was in excess of 400 parts per million (ppm). A quaternary ammonia sanitizer solution applied to food contact surfaces must be applied at the strength as indicated on the manufacturers' label. Quaternary ammonia dispenser must be repaired. Establishment will use a chlorine sanitizing solution in the meantime. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/30/2023

The presence of fruit flies is not controlled as evidenced by fruit flies in the ware-washing area. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Establishment must call pest control services. New Violation. Correct By: 11/30/2023

The knives and dough scraper are stored on an unclean surface (between prep unit and prep table and against the wall) between uses. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/30/2023

Single-service articles (pizza boxes) were observed stored on the floor in the dry storage area. Single-service articles must be stored at least 6 inches off the ground. New Violation. Correct By: 11/30/2023

The floors, ceiling, walk-in cooler and walls throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 11/30/2023
